prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山西省理科（2025年为物理类）最低录取位次分别为约10345名、10500名、9840名、9787名、9100名，整体呈波动前移趋势，近两年从9787名进一步前移至9100名，2025年基准位次约9100名；该校在山西省理科招生计划：2021年27人、2022年25人、2023年25人、2024年32人、2025年35人；2026年物理类计划大幅扩招至74人，较2025年增加39人，扩招幅度约111%，竞争显著缓解，位次预计大幅后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名（主校）2026年第28名，近年排名稳定在前30，学校层次高、综合实力强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号；抖音热度排名第55位，评价为"较热"，有一定短视频曝光；2024年曾出现投档线异常传言，但未影响实际录取位次前移趋势；依托大连理工大学整体学科实力，化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A、环境科学与工程A-等，盘锦校区开设的能源化学工程（化学工程与技术A+）、环境生态工程（环境科学与工程A-）等专业与优势学科高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 能源化学工程对应化学工程与技术A+，属高热推荐工科方向；经济学类对应工商管理A，社会热度分化观望；本省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较2025年173347人减少约5928人（-3.4%），竞争略有缓解；该校位于辽宁省盘锦市，非本省高校，在山西省无特殊地域偏好；2025年山西物理类考生占全国比例约中等水平，无显著跨省报考热度异常。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9100名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招111%至74人、本省物理类考生减少约3.4%等因素，扩招是影响2026年位次的最关键因素，将导致最低录取位次大幅后移；考生总数小幅减少对竞争略有缓解但不足以抵消扩招效应；预测2026年最低录取位次约15154名，区间14654–15654名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年该校在山西省物理类大幅扩招至74人，预计最低录取位次将后移至约15154名。位次在预测区间上限（15654名）以内的考生可重点考虑三档经济学类作为保底；位次在区间中段（约15154名）可主攻二档海洋技术或生物信息学；位次明显优于区间下限（14654名）可冲刺一档能源化学工程王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (physics category in 2025) in Shanxi Province were approximately 10345, 10500, 9840, 9787, and 9100, showing a fluctuating forward trend. In the past two years, it moved further from 9787 to 9100, with a baseline ranking of about 9100 in 2025. The enrollment plan for science in Shanxi Province: 27 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 32 in 2024, and 35 in 2025. In 2026, the physics category plan significantly expands to 74, an increase of 39 from 2025, an expansion rate of about 111%, significantly easing competition and expected to cause a substantial backward shift in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (main campus), stable in the top 30 in recent years, with high school level and strong comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving abnormal signals of admission cutoffs or submission lines. Douyin popularity ranks 55th, evaluated as 'relatively hot', with some short video exposure. In 2024, there were rumors of abnormal submission lines, but they did not affect the actual forward trend of admission rankings. Relying on the overall disciplinary strength of Dalian University of Technology, with Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, etc., the Panjin Campus offers majors such as Energy Chemical Engineering (Chemical Engineering and Technology A+) and Environmental Ecological Engineering (Environmental Science and Engineering A-), which are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Energy Chemical Engineering corresponds to Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, a high-heat recommended engineering direction; Economics corresponds to Business Administration A, with socially polarized and wait-and-see popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in this province is about 167419, a decrease of about 5928 (-3.4%) from 173347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. The university is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, not a local university, with no special regional preference in Shanxi Province. In 2025, the proportion of Shanxi physics category examinees nationwide is about medium level, with no significant abnormal cross-province application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 9100 in 2025, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by 111% to 74, and a decrease of about 3.4% in local physics category examinees, expansion is the most critical factor affecting the 2026 ranking, leading to a substantial backward shift in the minimum admission ranking. The slight decrease in total examinees slightly eases competition but is insufficient to offset the expansion effect. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 15154, with a range of 14654–15654.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the university significantly expands its physics category enrollment in Shanxi Province to 74, with the predicted minimum admission ranking shifting backward to about 15154. Candidates with rankings within the upper limit of the prediction range (15654) can focus on Tier 3 Economics as a safety option; those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 15154) can target Tier 2 Marine Technology or Bioinformatics; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (14654) can aim for Tier 1 Energy Chemical Engineering, a flagship major.
